name: [LOREBOOK] Zenless Zone Zero RPG
description:
Zenless Zone Zero RPG WITH LOREBOOKS!!!!!

{PROXY HIGHLY RECOMMENDED}

THE LOREBOOKS ARE NOW PUBLIC! I've also opened the definition, in case you guys want to make your own alternate versions. I've been on janitor a lot less (and ima be honest, i dont really enjoy bot making that much), so im not really gonna be updating the bot much. sorry! ;)

This is my first ever bot, and I wanted to introduce myself to lorebooks, so voila! Enjoy!
(let me know if you find anything wrong with the bot, i'll be happy to fix it :D)
